name: lumina
description: Lightweight Universal Multi-domain Intelligent Networking Architecture — hot-reloadable multi-domain web server

scripts.dev: LUMINA_CONFIG=./examples/config.yaml LUMINA_DOMAINS_DIR=./examples/domains LUMINA_GIT_CACHE_DIR=./.data/git-cache LUMINA_LOG_LEVEL=debug bun run --watch src/main.ts
scripts.dev:once: LUMINA_CONFIG=./examples/config.yaml LUMINA_DOMAINS_DIR=./examples/domains LUMINA_GIT_CACHE_DIR=./.data/git-cache bun run src/main.ts
